name: Material Planet Cosmology
summary: The Material Planet exists inside a larger cosmological system formed when the Primordial Unity bisected the astral sky. Doomsday ruptured the world, the gods stabilized elemental chaos into planetary bodies, and major cosmological structures such as Mother Storm, Umbra, Limbo, the Astral sky, the Ethereal Plane, and the Infinite Staircase remain active first-class parts of world behavior.
key_facts: The Material Planet divides the astral sky into upper and lower realms.
Doomsday occurred when Mega-Terozash punched through the Material Planet during a recombination attempt.
Planet of Fire, Planet of Ocean, Planet of Wind, and Planet of Rock were isolated from rampant astral essences during the Five Days of Chaos.
The Material Planet flips its axis every 73 days, five times a year, because of asymmetrical doom scars.
Mother Storm lies at the East Pole; Umbra lies at the West Pole; Limbo exists within black crystal doom scars in the core.
Astral and Ethereal structures remain distinct from the Material Plane and must not be collapsed into one vague afterworld.
